---
title: "02_DataExploration"
author: "Sushant Agellu"
date: "2026-03-18"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

```


```{r}

gse_id <- "GSE60424"

metadata <- fread(file.path("..", "01_DataCleaning", paste0(gse_id, "_metadata_clean.csv")))
counts <- fread(file.path("..", "01_DataCleaning", paste0(gse_id, "_counts_clean.csv")))

dim(metadata)
dim(counts)

```



```{r}
names(metadata)
head(metadata)

summary(metadata)

table(metadata$diseasestatus_ch1)
table(metadata$gender_ch1)
```



```{r}
ggplot(metadata, aes(x = diseasestatus_ch1, fill = diseasestatus_ch1)) +
  geom_bar() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Healthy Control" = "green",
    "Type 1 Diabetes" = "red",
    "Sepsis" = "blue",
    "ALS" = "purple",
    "MS pretreatment" = "orange",
    "MS posttreatment" = "brown"
  )) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Number of Samples by Disease Status",
       x = "Disease Status",
       y = "Count",
       fill = "Disease") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

```

```{r}

head(counts[, 1:6])

# remove gene_id column and keep only numeric expression values
expr_only <- counts[, -1]

dim(expr_only)
summary(expr_only[, 1:5])
```

```{r}
sample_totals <- colSums(expr_only)

sample_totals_df <- data.frame(
  sample = names(sample_totals),
  total_counts = sample_totals
)

ggplot(sample_totals_df, aes(x = total_counts)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Distribution of Total Counts per Sample",
       x = "Total Counts",
       y = "Number of Samples")
```

```{r}
expr_log <- log2(expr_only + 1)
summary(expr_log[, 1:5])
```
```{r}

# Remove gene_id column and convert expression data to a numeric matrix
expr_matrix <- as.matrix(counts[, -1])

# Log transform
expr_log <- log2(expr_matrix + 1)

# Keep only genes with non-zero standard deviation
keep_genes <- apply(expr_log, 1, sd) > 0
expr_log_filtered <- expr_log[keep_genes, ]

# Run PCA
pca <- prcomp(t(expr_log_filtered), scale. = TRUE)

# Extract sample names from metadata title
metadata$sample <- metadata$title

# PCA dataframe
pca_df <- data.frame(
  sample = rownames(pca$x),
  PC1 = pca$x[, 1],
  PC2 = pca$x[, 2]
)

# Merge PCA results with metadata
pca_df <- merge(pca_df, metadata, by = "sample")

# Plot PCA with disease colors and ellipses
ggplot(pca_df, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = diseasestatus_ch1)) +
  geom_point(size = 1) +
  stat_ellipse() +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "Healthy Control" = "green",
    "Type 1 Diabetes" = "red",
    "Sepsis" = "blue",
    "ALS" = "purple",
    "MS pretreatment" = "orange",
    "MS posttreatment" = "brown"
  )) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "PCA by Disease Status", color = "Disease")
```


```{r}



```
